steps.title: Identify what the title shows
steps.content: The UNESCO title marks Östersund as having a unique and vibrant food culture worthy of celebration. The blank needs a verb meaning indicates or signifies.

steps.title: Reject unrelated actions
steps.content: Choice A means rejects or gives up, which contradicts the positive context. Choice B means expresses dissatisfaction. Choice C means finds out, but the title itself indicates the city's food culture. The answer is D.
